query:
INSERT INTO artifacts (
            id,
            job_id,
            attempt,
            relative_path,
            name,
            storage_path,
            content_type,
            size_bytes,
            sha256,
            visibility,
            created_at
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NULL, $7, $8, $9, $10)
